title: Enhanced RAG Pipeline + File Upload for Knowledge Base
description: Implement document_loader.py, rag_engine.py, upload_tools.py, upgrade embeddings.py, add upload endpoint to web dashboard, add upload UI to frontend, integrate RAG into orchestrator, update .env.example and requirements_v2.txt.
steps: Create core/knowledge/document_loader.py with multi-format file parser
Create core/knowledge/rag_engine.py with enhanced RAG retrieval
Create core/tools/upload_tools.py with file upload processing
Update interfaces/web_dashboard/static/app.js with upload UI logic
acceptance_criteria: All new files are importable without errors
All optional libraries are gracefully handled with try/except
Existing knowledge base functionality is not broken
RAG only injects context when RAG_ENABLED=true
TF-IDF remains the default embeddings engine
Upload supports drag & drop in the web UI
findings: python-multipart package is required for FastAPI file uploads (added to requirements_v2.txt)
MySQL not available in sandbox, SQLite fallback works correctly
All 14 files (3 new + 8 modified + 3 task files) committed successfully
